details.productUrlName: Aether Refinery Extended Art Ripple Foil

customAttributes.description:
If you would get one or more E, you get twice that many E instead.
T: You get E, then you may pay one or more E. If you do, create an X/X black Aetherborn creature token, where X is the amount of E paid this way.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 6/14/2024. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: Avaati Vya's invention stabilized raw aether, but even she didn't know it would also create life.
